SentralPlusMember Rewards

Stay your way.
Rewarded every time.

SentralPlus rewards you for staying your way. Members enjoy exclusive access, preferred experiences, and instant recognition at participating Sentral properties — whether you’re here for a few nights or a while. Join once and enjoy more every time.

Join SentralPlus — It’s Free  →
Scroll to explore
What is SentralPlus

Not points
you’ll never use.
Real rewards, now.

Most loyalty programs require months of accumulation before you see a single benefit. SentralPlus works differently. Rewards are instant — delivered during your current stay or on your next booking, not someday when you finally hit a threshold.

From room upgrades to early check-in, late checkout to on-site F&B credits — your benefits unlock the moment you book directly. The more you stay, the more you enjoy.

Create your account  →

Member benefits

What you get
as a member.

SentralPlus is a recognition program, not a discount program. Every benefit is designed to make your stay feel genuinely different from the moment you arrive.

🔑
Member-Only Rates
Exclusive pricing available only to logged-in members. Always better than the public rate, always better than OTAs.
⬆️
Room Upgrades
Complimentary upgrades when available — confirmed in real time at booking, no waiting at the front desk.
🕐
Early Check-In & Late Checkout
Arrive when you want. Leave when you’re ready. Subject to availability, confirmed digitally at booking.
🍷
F&B Credits & Experiences
On-property food and beverage credits, priority access to Sentral events, and curated experiences at select communities.
🌐
Portfolio-Wide Recognition
One membership. Every Sentral community. Your status and rewards follow you — every city, every stay, every time.
